title: Noland Enters the Legend
description: The flashback shows how Shandora was torn away into the sky, leaving Noland and Calgara’s promise unresolved for centuries.
scene: Across pages 5, 6, 7, 8, this scene focuses on Wyper, Noland, Mont Blanc Noland, Calgara, Musse. The flashback shows how Shandora was torn away into the sky, leaving Noland and Calgara’s promise unresolved for centuries.

dialogue.speaker: Calgara
dialogue.text: Then we should have never welcomed you!

dialogue.speaker: Wyper
dialogue.text: For us Shandia, these spirit resting trees...

dialogue.speaker: Wyper
dialogue.text: Are as important as our very lives.

dialogue.speaker: Calgara
dialogue.text: And we've gone and cut'em all down...

dialogue.speaker: Aisa
dialogue.text: It's understand- able why they're so angry,

dialogue.speaker: Enel
dialogue.text: We reverse our ancestors like gods.

dialogue.speaker: Calgara
dialogue.text: But admiral! Surely, in this case, we-
